title: Cancellation of leave
doc_html:
§434.  Cancellation of leave

All or any portion of the approved athletic leave of absence provided for in this Part may be cancelled retroactively by the employer if the employee does not participate in the training or competition.

Added by Acts 1978, No. 70, §1, eff. June 16, 1978.
doc_text:
§434.  Cancellation of leave
All or any portion of the approved athletic leave of absence provided for in this Part may be cancelled retroactively by the employer if the employee does not participate in the training or competition.
Added by Acts 1978, No. 70, §1, eff. June 16, 1978.
